name: GeoJSON to CoT
info:
Convert GeoJSON Feature / FeatureCollection into TAK CoT XML.

## Input

`msg.payload` is one of:
- GeoJSON `Feature`
- GeoJSON `FeatureCollection`
- Array of Features

Supported geometries: `Point`, `Polygon`, `LineString`. Other types are dropped silently.

## Output

One `msg` per feature on the single output wire. Each message has:
- `msg.payload` — CoT XML string (UTF-8, ends with `</event>` — no trailing newline added)
- `msg.topic` — stable UID (based on `UID_PREFIX` + feature.id / properties.id / index)

Downstream nodes (tcp out, mqtt out) receive each feature as a separate message.

## Environment variables

| Name | Default | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `COT_TYPE` | `a-u-G` | CoT event type for Point features. For Polygon / LineString, a `u-d-f` (drawing) type is used if `COT_TYPE` does not already start with `u-d`. |
| `UID_PREFIX` | `geojson` | Prefix for generated UIDs. Full UID is `<prefix>-<id>` where id falls back to `feature.id`, `properties.id`, or the feature index. |
| `STALE_SECONDS` | `300` | How long the CoT is valid after emission. |
| `CALLSIGN_PROP` | `name` | `feature.properties.<name>` becomes the CoT `callsign`. |
| `REMARKS_PROP` | `description` | `feature.properties.<name>` becomes the CoT `<remarks>`. |
| `ALTITUDE_PROP` | (empty) | Optional. `feature.properties.<name>` becomes `point[@hae]`. If empty, uses `geometry.coordinates[2]` when present, else 0. |
| `SPEED_PROP` | (empty) | Optional. Populates `<track speed>` (m/s). Adds `<track>` to detail when speed or course is set. |
| `COURSE_PROP` | (empty) | Optional. Populates `<track course>` (degrees true). |

Air/sea track pipelines (e.g., ADS-B) should set `COT_TYPE` to an `a-f-A-*` / `a-n-A-*` value and populate altitude/speed/course props.

Weather/earthquake pipelines emitting polygons pass through with the default `COT_TYPE=a-u-G` — the function auto-switches to `u-d-f` for non-point geometries.

## Shape rendering

Polygon and LineString features are emitted as TAK drawing events:
- Outer ring vertices become `<link point="lat,lon,hae"/>` entries in `<detail>`.
- Interior rings (holes) are ignored — TAK CoT drawings don't represent them.
- Point position is the centroid.
- Stroke/fill colors and `labels_on` are set to reasonable defaults; override in a downstream change node if you need custom styling.

name: build CoT
